title: The Ultimate Create Modpack
description: The amazing mods Create, Clockwork and Eureka all in one!
body:
This modpack contains all the mods you need for the Create itch, allowing you to do anything as you wish! I assembled this modpack for any users to use this as a base and build upon it themselves. 


_**Please keep in mind when downloading that,**_
### _**T.C.M**_
_Stands for The Create Modpack that contains the base three mods while,_
### _**T.U.C.M**_
_Stands for The Ultimate Modpack containing most of the working addons._

# What does this modpack actually do?
What these mods contain might be familiar to fellow create players but here is an overview of what each of the main mods do.
- **Create** - Adds a lot of technology into minecraft whilst keeping it kinda vanilla. That means you could have your own factories in minecraft!
  
- **Eureka** - Allows you to make an actual ship that isnt limited to crafting recipes instead FULL BLOCKS using a helm. Ever wanted to feel like Cpt. Jack Sparrow while sailing your own ship? this is  the perfect mod for you.
  
- **Clockwork** - Integrates physics and physical forces into create contraptions, you can build some really cool planes and helicopters! again.. WITH PLACEABLE BLOCKS!


### Other details about the modpack
Furthermore, with some performance mods that shouldn't conflict with any other mod, allowing you to add many mods of your choice with out performance loss as a bonus for my low performance users.
